title: A massive harvest for the app showcase
summary:
A huge day for the community showcase with seven new apps added, plus some essential hardware and registry tuning under the hood.

The community directory is overflowing today. We merged in a huge batch of new tools built on our infrastructure, including ComfyUI nodes (Overtli Studio), a brand visual generator (StyleOps), a deadpan fake museum exhibit creator (The Institute of Everything), and a handful of Telegram bots and art apps. The ecosystem is buzzing.

We accidentally dropped a few apps during a recent file rebuild. Today we restored tomdacatto's video generator and @abhi5hek1979's Polli-com to the directory, and fixed the attribution for PollGen so @XHyperDEVX gets proper credit. Everyone's Flower tier status is back where it belongs.

On the backend, we fixed an INT4 model path issue for RTX 4090s, swapped the Z-Image heartbeat to HTTPS to stop proxy errors, and ripped out a complex ServiceId lookup layer in the model registry. Simpler internal architecture, stabler image generation.
